official_functions.role: Construct the official Configuration serverbound cookie_response packet fixture
Write the official Configuration serverbound cookie_response body
Write the full Configuration serverbound framed cookie_response packet
Dispatch and decode the full Configuration serverbound framed cookie_response packet
Name the packet id assigned in Configuration serverbound state
Read decoded cookie_response fields from the official packet instance

invariants: The official Configuration serverbound protocol codec writes the packet table id before the cookie_response body.
The official Configuration serverbound protocol codec dispatches the framed packet id to ServerboundCookieResponsePacket.
The decoded official ServerboundCookieResponsePacket preserves the Identifier key and non-null payload bytes produced by the official fixture.
The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, decoded key, decoded payload, and remaining decode byte count are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
This contract does not prove cookie storage policy, request/response runtime behavior, Configuration completion, or Play readiness.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer cookie storage policy, cookie request/response runtime behavior, Configuration-to-Play readiness, or Play readiness.
